name: Children's Museum of Manhattan (CMOM)

hours.notes: Also open on holiday Mondays

pricing.details: $17 online / $18 at door. Seniors $14 online / $15 at door. Under 1 free. Members free.

description: Five floors of hands-on exhibits designed for ages 0-6, including the PlayWorks toddler area with soft play and a mini NYC neighborhood.

name: Chelsea Forest Play

hours.notes: Open play sessions are 50 minutes, reservation required. Schedule varies; check website for available time slots.

pricing.details: $35 per child for a 50-minute open play session. Sibling discounts available.

description: Nature-inspired indoor forest playground with a two-level treehouse, slides, play kitchen, dress-up wardrobe, sensory room, and cozy reading corner for toddlers.

name: The Art Farm in the City
address: 431 East 91st Street, Floor 2, New York, NY 10128

hours.notes: Open play Mon-Thu 12:30-3:30 PM only. Weekend mornings are animal visit drop-ins ($15). No open play Fri-Sun.

pricing.details: $20 per child for open play (Mon-Thu). Weekend animal visits $15. Drop-in classes $45.

description: Unique indoor play space with NYC's only indoor petting zoo, plus faux-grass floors, art and music classes, and a coffee bar for parents.

name: Twinkle Playspace

hours.notes: Socks required for all. 2-hour sessions. $5 surcharge if purchased at door.

pricing.details: $20 per child + $15 per adult for a 2-hour session (online). $5 surcharge at the door.

description: 4,500-square-foot toddler-focused playspace with a climbable tree, firehouse, Brooklyn Bridge construction zone, water table, and mythical dragon features for ages 0-6.

name: Fairytale Island

hours.notes: Socks required. On-site cafe with snacks and beverages.

pricing.details: $20 per child. Group discount: $17 each for 3+ children.

description: Imaginative indoor playground with a faux sandbox, giant ball pit, train ride, swings, slides, trampoline, climbing wall, and kids shopping center.

name: Wonderland Playhouse

hours.notes: Open daily. Additional time can be purchased at the front desk.

pricing.details: $25 per child for 2 hours of open play. Monthly unlimited passes available.

description: Nearly 4,000-square-foot sensory-rich play space with ball pit, zipline, dress-up station, Lego and Magna-Tile tables, mini carousel, and claw machines for ages 0-10.

name: Brooklyn Children's Museum

hours.notes: Free admission Thursdays 2-5 PM courtesy of Amazon. EBT/SNAP discounts available.

pricing.details: $15 per person general admission. Free Thursdays 2-5 PM. Member and community partner discounts available.

description: World's first children's museum with the beloved Totally Tots exhibit, a dedicated toddler area with water play, building blocks, and imaginative play stations.

name: Bronx Children's Museum

hours.notes: Walk-ups are first-come, first-served. Reservations recommended. EBT holders $3.

pricing.details: Children $8, Adults $14, Seniors $10. Under 1 free. EBT holders $3.

description: 13,000-square-foot museum with a water table, 'The Block' mini-neighborhood for pretend play, and 'The Nest' soft play area designed for crawlers and toddlers.

name: KidsZone Indoor Playground

hours.notes: Socks required; available for purchase at $3. Open daily.

pricing.details: $15/child for 1 hour, $22/child for 2 hours, $30/child for 4 hours.

description: Colorful indoor playground with a trumpet slide, obstacle course, ball pit, and soft play areas suitable for toddlers in the heart of Corona, Queens.

name: Rainbow Castle Indoor Playground

hours.notes: Additional adults $10 each. Snack bar on site.

pricing.details: $20 per child with 1 free adult. Additional adults $10 each.

description: Themed indoor playground with a dedicated toddler area, interactive sensory walls, massive ball pit, slides, trampolines, and STEM activity zones.

name: Kids Fun House

hours.notes: Walk-ins welcome. Hours may change due to private events. Includes 40 arcade game credits.

pricing.details: $16/child Tue/Thu/Fri, $12/child Wed, $20/child Sat-Sun. Includes 2 free adults + 40 arcade credits.

description: Three-story indoor playground with a separate socks-only toddler area featuring a small tree to climb, a playhouse, mini slide, plus arcade games for older kids.

name: Kidz Fun Palace

hours.notes: Open daily. Walk-ins welcome.

pricing.details: $15 per child including 1 adult for a 2-hour session.

description: 4,000+ square feet of play with 20,000-ball ball pit, merry-go-round, enclosed trampoline, obstacle course, arcade, and a proportionally-sized toddler section.

name: Jungle Adventure NYC

hours.notes: Walk-ins accepted but spots limited. Socks required. Call 917-622-1279 for availability.

pricing.details: Approximately $25 per child for a 1.5-hour session including 1 adult. Pricing varies by day and duration; check website.

description: Jungle-themed indoor playground for ages 2-12 with rainbow slides, ball pit, trampoline, ninja courses, ball blasters, and block building area.

name: Hooray Indoor Playground

hours.notes: 8,000 square feet. Described as clean with reasonable prices.

pricing.details: Approximately $20 per child. Contact venue at (718) area code for exact current pricing.

description: 8,000-square-foot play space with trampoline, dress-up station, merry-go-round, ball pit, slide structures, soft toddler area, and arcade games.

name: The Kids Town

hours.notes: Open daily. 90-minute sessions.

pricing.details: $25 per child for a 90-minute open play session.

description: Family-owned Park Slope play space for newborn to age 7, with climbing structures, pretend play areas, and art classes in an intimate neighborhood setting.

name: NY Preschool & Kids Club (W 68th Street)

hours.notes: Open play requires membership. Large gym with 20-foot trampoline.

pricing.details: Monthly open play membership: $300/child, $150 each additional child. Annual: $3,300/child. Includes unlimited open play + gym access.

description: State-of-the-art gym with a 20-foot trampoline, balance beams, sprung floor, and four classrooms offering open play and enrichment classes for ages 2 months to 12 years.

name: My Gym Upper East Side (83rd Street)

hours.notes: $75 lifetime membership fee. Open gym available between classes. 25% sibling discount.

pricing.details: $75 one-time lifetime membership fee, plus per-class pricing (varies by program). Open gym between classes included. 25% sibling/twin discount.

description: Structured Mommy & Me classes and gymnastics programs for ages 6 weeks to 10 years, with open gym time between classes for free play on age-appropriate equipment.

name: Gymboree Play & Music (Upper East Side)

hours.notes: Classes are 45 minutes. Open gym hours listed are drop-in times between scheduled classes.

pricing.details: $59 per class/open gym visit. Semester packages available at lower per-class rates.

description: Play-based classes in art, music, and sensory exploration for ages 0-5, plus drop-in open gym sessions with climbing structures and age-appropriate equipment.

name: Discovery Programs Playpark
address: 251 West 100th Street at West End Avenue, New York, NY 10025

hours.notes: Limited schedule: Tuesdays and Fridays only, 45-minute sessions. Cash only. Closed on holiday weeks.

pricing.details: $25 drop-in for non-students, $10 for Discovery Programs students. Cash only.

description: Intimate indoor playspace for ages 6-48 months with parent/caregiver supervision, offering gentle open play in a nurturing UWS community setting.

name: Playgarden Prep (Tribeca)

hours.notes: Playground open 7 days. Access requires semester-based membership or $50 trial day pass (includes 1 class + 1 hr playground).

pricing.details: $50 trial day pass (1 class + 1 hour playground). Semester memberships: ~$450-750/season for playground access, plus class enrollment starting at $750. Contact for current rates.

description: NYC's largest indoor playground for under-5s at 3,000 sq ft, with custom climbing structures, slides, and rotating equipment, paired with enrichment classes.
